title: Implement Supabase Realtime channel listener on the client
description: Establish a real-time WebSocket channel listener on the dashboard and meeting detail pages using the Supabase client to receive `INSERT` updates for `transcript_chunks` table.
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend listens to table `transcript_chunks` filtered by the current `meeting_id`.
Updates are received in real-time as they are written to the database.
Realtime subscription is cleaned up when the component unmounts.

steps.description: Configure Supabase Realtime channel client listener
steps.details: Use `supabase.channel().on('postgres_changes', ...)` to listen for changes on `transcript_chunks` table.

steps.description: Integrate listener hook in UI components
steps.details: Integrate the listener hook in `src/app/meetings/[id]/page.tsx` and ensure incoming chunks are appended to the local state.
Return a unsubscribe function in `useEffect` hook to prevent resource leaks when leaving pages.

technicalNotes: Make sure to filter subscription events by `meeting_id` to avoid receiving transcripts from other users' meetings.
